title: arthraxon langsdorffii var. centrasiaticus
intro: Arthraxon langsdorffii var. centrasiaticus, also known as Centesimal arthraxon, is a plant species within the family Poaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of central Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and expectorant actions. The health benefits associated with Centesimal arthraxon include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate coughs. Herbal preparations of Centesimal arthraxon include infusions and decoctions, often used to treat respiratory infections and other related health conditions.
